CONTACT US

P1500D

FPV Video Transmission Snapshot & Positioning Pilot Device
Product Type: Backpack-Mount

Full coverage of FPV

FPV video transmission interception

Positioning Pilot

Multiple Deployment Forms

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Multiple Deployment Forms

Catering to Different Application Scenarios

FPV Full Coverage

Full coverage of the analog video transmission frequency band from 300MHz to 6.2GHz.

FPV Video Transmission Interception

Intercept FPV video to view first-person feeds analyze targets live and store footage.

Integrated design

It features a high degree of integration, strong flexibility, and mobility, enabling efficient deployment in any defense field.

Full-frequency detection

Full – frequency coverage from 70MHz to 6.2GHz.

Multiple Deployment Forms

Catering to Different Application Scenarios

FPV Full Coverage

Full coverage of the analog video transmission frequency band from 300MHz to 6.2GHz.

FPV Video Transmission Interception

Intercept FPV video to view first-person feeds analyze targets live and store footage.

Integrated design

It features a high degree of integration, strong flexibility, and mobility, enabling efficient deployment in any defense field.

Full-frequency detection

Full – frequency coverage from 70MHz to 6.2GHz.

Multiple Deployment Forms

Catering to Different Application Scenarios

FPV Full Coverage

Full coverage of the analog video transmission frequency band from 300MHz to 6.2GHz.

FPV Video Transmission Interception

Intercept FPV video to view first-person feeds analyze targets live and store footage.

Features

Recognition type

The vast majority of mainstream – brand drones and most FPV drones

Detection frequency band

It supports custom scanning from 70MHz to 6GHz. By default, the frequencies are 400MHz, 800MHz, 900MHz, 1.2GHz, 1.4GHz, 2.4GHz, 5.2GHz, and 5.8GHz.

Detection range

Mainstream-brand drones ≥10KM, FPV ≥2KM

DID/RID positioning range

DID ≥10KM, RID ≥5KM

Video Transmission Interception Range

≥1.5KM

FPV Video Transmission Detection

≥1.5KM

Precision

≤10m

Video Transmission Detection Frequency Band

Supports detection of all analog video transmissions within the 300MHz−6GHz frequency band (user-customizable).

Size

400mm∗165mm∗500mm

Battery life

≥6h
